title: Opening for Software Engineer at HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd:
HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
